headline: Housing Policy Targets 500,000 Affordable Units by 2030
context: Government launched updated National Housing Policy targeting 500,000 affordable units priced below RM300,000 by 2030.

cards.big: New policy targets 500,000 affordable units below RM300,000 by 2030
cards.sub: Five-year target requires 100,000 units annually triple current rate

cards.big: Current delivery of 35,000 affordable units per year far below needed 100,000
cards.sub: Developer margins on sub-RM300,000 homes average only 4%

cards.big: Government allocated RM3.5 billion seed fund for affordable housing in 2026
cards.sub: Estimate suggests RM25 billion total public investment needed over 5 years

cards.big: Cross-subsidy model requires 30% affordable units in each new project
cards.sub: Industry lobby reduced requirement from 40% proposed in original draft

cards.big: Housing targets test whether delivery mechanisms can match the scale of stated ambition
500,000 affordable units by 2030 requires 100,000 per year. Current delivery is below 40,000 annually.
